issue: Difficulty: ❌ TRIVIAL - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Hardened repair-flask-signalbox-configs for the python=>HARD gate by adding inherit_when_from/base_when bulletin tail logic (BUL-AV/AZ/BA) with glossary entries and failed-attempt notes; fixed parse_detail base_when handling in helpers.py and solution/repair_cartridge.py; aligned instruction.md with play_shift invocation, dispatch.duckdb logging, lock_corrections overrides, and inherit cascade semantics; added three inherit tests and updated a prefix assertion; bumped platform-revision to r32; refreshed submission explanations and rubrics.
